Core Strengths: Unconditional removal, discard, tutoring, reanimation, sacrifice, drain
Design Principles: The mechanical color pie is a snapshot, not a fixed law (https://app.notion.com/p/The-mechanical-color-pie-is-a-snapshot-not-a-fixed-law-385f1559c99b8163aa2fcd73ae5aac7a?pvs=21), Blue gets card draw and selection because it is the color of knowledge (https://app.notion.com/p/Blue-gets-card-draw-and-selection-because-it-is-the-color-of-knowledge-385f1559c99b811ca788d65041e41c12?pvs=21), Black draws cards only by paying a cost ('power at any cost') (https://app.notion.com/p/Black-draws-cards-only-by-paying-a-cost-power-at-any-cost-385f1559c99b8138915acc6a7a43a112?pvs=21), Removal philosophy: black destroys unconditionally, white conditionally (https://app.notion.com/p/Removal-philosophy-black-destroys-unconditionally-white-conditionally-385f1559c99b81a192d1e84fa4b9d643?pvs=21), Enemy colors define identity by mechanical exclusion (https://app.notion.com/p/Enemy-colors-define-identity-by-mechanical-exclusion-385f1559c99b818b98a0c559d39668a6?pvs=21)
